plugins.name: ingest-codex
plugins.description: Ingests an iSoftData Svelte component into the Codex memory bank by reading source files directly in the component repo, resolving types from imports, and writing the entry JSON to the sibling isoft-memory-experiment repo.

plugins.name: project-summarizer
plugins.description: Creates and incrementally updates a PROJECT.md file that gives Claude or any LLM instant orientation to a codebase  without needing to reconstruct project understanding from scratch each session.

plugins.name: quick-plan
plugins.description: Use when the user has rough or loosely organized thoughts about what to build next and wants to move directly to an implementation plan without a full brainstorming session, spec document, or design review.
